/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/mouse_card_quadrature_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/M68705P3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/MC6821.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/MouseCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mouse_card_quadrature.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_mouse_card_quadrature  -ldl -lm
